root.title: Errant Tower
root.description: Embark on a journey through the endless floors of the Errant Tower. Explore strange domains, battle deadly foes and acquire valuable loot. Shape your character, craft mythical equipment and expand your base. Unwind in an old-school browser RPG - and uncover the Tower's hidden secrets.

errors.unknown: Unknown error, please try again later
errors.usernameInvalid: Username should be between 3 and 12 characters
errors.actionCodeAttemptsExceeded: Sign in limit reached, sign in again
